meta.title: DEF CON 32 - Physical OSINT - Lukas McCullough
meta.description: Open source intelligence may sound like something you’ve never done, but even something as simple as finding your old friends on social media overlaps with skills required for the job. Learn about what OSINT is, how to start an investigation, and resources used by experts to collect the maximum amount of data on a facility before ever visiting the site.
